race.comment: PALLADIUM (3) knuckled down strongly to get within a long neck of the winner in second last start over 1400m at Corowa. Backmarker who gets home hard and should prove hard to hold out now he's nearing peak fitness. PHANTOM'S CHASE (4) finished out of the money when fresh from a spell two starts back then was beaten 1.75 lengths when fourth over 1623m at Moe a week-and-a-half ago. Likely improver with strong prospects. SAKER FALCON (6) has put together back-to-back placings, the latest when 3 lengths away in second over 1400m at this track. Well placed to figure prominently again. BOULDEROO (2) has been respectively at two runs back, which he'll be better for, and draws much better than some of the major players.
